heading: Handling of proceeds from disposal
label: 705 Handling of proceeds from disposal
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70540:513., title IV, § 403, .June 30, 1949, ch. 28863 Stat. 398In subsection (d)(1), the words “in the Treasury” are substituted for “with the Treasurer of the United States” because of section 1 of Reorganization Plan No. 26 of 1950 (eff. , ), restated as .July 31, 195064 Stat. 1280section 321 of title 31
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70540:513., title IV, § 403, .June 30, 1949, ch. 28863 Stat. 398In subsection (d)(1), the words “in the Treasury” are substituted for “with the Treasurer of the United States” because of section 1 of Reorganization Plan No. 26 of 1950 (eff. , ), restated as .July 31, 195064 Stat. 1280section 321 of title 31

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: This section applies to proceeds from the sale, lease, or other disposition of foreign excess property under this chapter.

children.heading: .—Foreign Currencies or Credits
children.label: b .—Foreign Currencies or Credits
children.text: Proceeds in the form of foreign currencies or credits, must be administered in accordance with procedures that the Secretary of the Treasury may establish.

children.heading: .—Separate fund in treasury
children.label: 1 .—Separate fund in treasury
children.text: applies to proceeds of foreign excess property disposed of for United States currency under this chapter.Section 572(a) of this title

children.heading: .—Deposited in treasury as miscellaneous receipts
children.label: 2 .—Deposited in treasury as miscellaneous receipts
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (1), proceeds in the form of United States currency, including foreign currencies or credits that are reduced to United States currency, must be deposited in the Treasury as miscellaneous receipts.

children.heading: Special Account for Refunds or Payments for Breach.—
children.label: d Special Account for Refunds or Payments for Breach.—
A
children.text: appropriate refunds to purchasers for dispositions that are rescinded or that do not become final; and

children.heading: .—Withdrawals
children.label: 2 .—Withdrawals
children.text: A federal agency that deposits proceeds in a special account under paragraph (1) may withdraw amounts to be refunded or paid from the account without regard to the origin of the amounts withdrawn.
